nasb.text: and their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. And the three sons of Zeruiah were Abshai, Joab and Asahel.

esv.text: And their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. The sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, Joab, and Asahel, three.

cnv.text: 他們的姊妹是洗魯雅和亞比該。洗魯雅的兒子是亞比篩、約押和亞撒黑，共三人。

ccb.text: 他们的姊妹是洗鲁雅和亚比该。洗鲁雅的三个儿子是亚比筛、约押和亚撒黑。
